item.arcana.fool_soul.tooltip.line1: Fated to witness every beginning of a journey
entity.arcana.the_fool.intro.line2: I was card zero. The beginning of all things. And I shall be your end.
entity.arcana.the_fool.death: Commendable, human... I shall remain with you to see how you face my brethren.
